bird.name: 聖芬生鸚鵡
bird.summary: 聖文森鸚鵡（Amazona guildingii）是一種大型及色彩鮮艷的鸚鵡，為島國聖文森的特有種也是國鳥，數量非常稀少。 特徵 聖芬生鸚鵡長40厘米。牠們的頭部呈黃白色、藍色及綠色，上身綠銅色，腳灰色，眼睛紅色，雙翼及尾羽紫藍綠色。牠們有黃褐色及綠色的形態。雌鳥及雄鳥相似。雛…

relations.subject: 聖芬生鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Hunting for food, trapping for the cage-bird trade and habitat loss were the principal causes of this species' decline. Deforestation has been the result of forestry activities, the expansion of banana cultivation, charcoal production, the loss of nesting-trees felled by trappers seeking young birds for trade, and natural events such as hurricanes and volcanic eruptions.Snyder, N.; McGowan, P.; Gilardi, J.; Grajal, A
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 聖芬生鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Hunting for food, trapping for the cage-bird trade and habitat loss were the principal causes of this species' decline. Deforestation has been the result of forestry activities, the expansion of banana cultivation, charcoal production, the loss of nesting-trees felled by trappers seeking young birds for trade, and natural events such as hurricanes and volcanic eruptions.Snyder, N.; McGowan, P.; Gilardi, J.; Grajal, A
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 聖芬生鸚鵡

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 聖芬生鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Increased raids and poaching at the Sanctuary, the deliberate cutting off of the Sanctuary's water supply, and little or no support from the local Police when raids occur, all mean that this small population is unlikely to survive. relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
